title: Wi-Fi icon
drDigitalIntro:
The Wi-Fi icon shows if you're connected to the internet.
• It looks like a set of curved lines.
• Click it to choose which wireless network to join.
drDigitalSuccess: That's the Wi-Fi icon — your window to the internet connection.
drDigitalHint: Spot the curved lines near the clock on the playground desktop, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
